proof_obligation: A fixed owner proves every slot contains a valid T for its whole lifetime.
caller_contracts: fixed arrays; fixed buffers; static tables
current_evidence_or_blocker: TYPE-2 and STOR-1 establish fixed fully initialized array/buffer storage, but elements are Copy-only.
semantic_minimum: Checked allocation and full initialization; all indexes bounds checked; exact owner free.
protected_performance_rule: Preserve the existing two-word buffer and one allocation; add no capacity, occupancy, generation, or sharing metadata.

proof_obligation: A contiguous fixed owner may contain record values without silently cloning resource ownership.
caller_contracts: fixed AoS record buffers; FFI-shaped records; row scans
current_evidence_or_blocker: TYPE-2 rejects record elements; SoA P2 is measured but does not preserve the AoS contract.
semantic_minimum: Admit the frozen record ownership class and field access while preserving one allocation and contiguous rows.
protected_performance_rule: AoS must remain expressible; no claim that it globally replaces SoA.

proof_obligation: The owner proves exactly one live prefix [0,len) and an inaccessible non-T tail.
caller_contracts: growable sequence; heap; byte/text builder; dense stack
current_evidence_or_blocker: Current buffer length is allocation length and all slots are live T.
semantic_minimum: Only live slots may be read, borrowed, moved, or dropped; spare capacity is neither readable nor droppable as T.
protected_performance_rule: No per-slot occupancy metadata or branch is charged when prefix proof state suffices.

proof_obligation: The owner proves a wrapped live range representable as at most two intervals.
current_evidence_or_blocker: A simple dense prefix makes front removal O(n); a generic sparse encoding would add avoidable metadata.
semantic_minimum: Checked logical-to-physical mapping, two-slice exposure, wrap/rebalance, and exact live-slot drop.
protected_performance_rule: No per-slot sparse tag on the canonical ring path unless Lock A measures and selects it.

proof_obligation: The owner proves an arbitrary occupied set and ties every readable payload to checked occupancy state.
current_evidence_or_blocker: No partial initialization or occupancy-to-payload relation exists; split control/payload would create a new fact channel.
semantic_minimum: Atomic checked Full/Vacant transitions, exact live-slot destruction, and unforgeable metadata/payload coherence.
protected_performance_rule: Do not charge dense or append-only paths for sparse metadata.

proof_obligation: One owner may prove several related live ranges whose bounds depend on each other.
caller_contracts: B-tree node; ECS aligned columns; multi-buffer transaction
current_evidence_or_blocker: Current owners have one fixed fully live range; no cross-buffer invariant can be sealed from clients.
semantic_minimum: Checked relation establishment and atomic preservation across split, merge, migration, and failure.
protected_performance_rule: Do not require a universal bitmap when compact dependent counters prove the state.

proof_obligation: A transition may own an inaccessible hole or source/destination live ranges without exposing invalid T.
caller_contracts: direct relocation; stable compaction; gap sequence; node split
current_evidence_or_blocker: Current partial move kills the root and cannot reinitialize it; an affine token may be abandoned.
semantic_minimum: Every normal exit or permitted abandonment already leaves a valid owner, or exact-use/derived cleanup is separately proven.
protected_performance_rule: Direct element traffic remains a measured selection axis; adjacent-swap or rebuild simulations do not get free equivalence.

proof_obligation: Live bytes may additionally carry a checked refinement such as UTF-8 validity.
caller_contracts: String; text slices; validated protocol values
current_evidence_or_blocker: Initialization alone does not establish a refinement type or seal/invalidation path.
semantic_minimum: Only checked constructors/transitions mint the refinement; every byte mutation invalidates or re-establishes it.
protected_performance_rule: Reuse byte storage without charging raw byte sequences for text validation or metadata.

proof_obligation: Move one affine value into dead storage exactly once.
current_evidence_or_blocker: Buffers reject affine elements and expose no dead storage state.
semantic_minimum: Destination becomes live only after the value is written; failure returns or preserves the offered owner.
protected_performance_rule: No hidden Copy/Clone and no preconstructed spare T.

proof_obligation: Move one affine value out while atomically changing its slot to a non-readable state.
caller_contracts: pop; remove; occupied-entry removal; box extraction
current_evidence_or_blocker: OWN-1 kills the whole root on partial move and forbids reinitialization.
semantic_minimum: Returned value has one owner; the source slot is no longer read or dropped; surrounding owner remains valid.
protected_performance_rule: O(1) pop/swap-remove and family-specific remove bounds must remain attainable.

proof_obligation: Move a new value into one live place and return the old value with two-transfer traffic.
caller_contracts: replace; entry replacement; backpatch affine field
current_evidence_or_blocker: No sanctioned take/replace; swap-based simulation can add traffic and cannot leave a hole.
semantic_minimum: The place remains live across the public operation; neither value is silently dropped or cloned.
protected_performance_rule: Price against direct two-transfer relocation, not a three-swap implementation.

proof_obligation: Exchange two runtime-proven-disjoint live affine places.
caller_contracts: sort; heap repair; graph rewiring; dynamic swap
current_evidence_or_blocker: Copy values can be staged manually, but OWN-7 conservatively overlaps dynamic indexed places and affine elements are absent.
semantic_minimum: Checked distinctness proves two exclusive places for the operation and expires after mutation.
protected_performance_rule: No hidden allocation or whole-container rebuild; element traffic is counted.

proof_obligation: Move a live range to nonoverlapping or overlap-safe destination storage without source drops.
caller_contracts: growth; insert/remove shift; make-contiguous; node split
current_evidence_or_blocker: No general affine storage or raw-free-after-move transition exists.
semantic_minimum: Each source ownership reaches exactly one destination; partial completion and overlap direction are proved.
protected_performance_rule: Direct relocation byte model is the structural baseline.

proof_obligation: Explicitly duplicate values only through a callable clone contract and clean partial output on failure.
current_evidence_or_blocker: Copy elements duplicate implicitly; no general callable Clone path or partial-clone cleanup.
semantic_minimum: Cloning is distinct from relocation and has explicit behavior/failure obligations.
protected_performance_rule: Never infer clone from storage relocation; charge calls, allocation, and partial cleanup.

proof_obligation: Destroy exactly the live payloads and free every owned allocation once.
caller_contracts: clear; truncate; owner drop; partial construction; recursive destroy
current_evidence_or_blocker: STOR-3 derives owner drops on normal exits, but current buffers contain Copy elements and no partial live set exists.
semantic_minimum: Drop decisions come only from kernel-owned proof state; moved-from or dead slots are never dropped.
protected_performance_rule: No full-capacity drop scan for dense-prefix storage; bounded-stack recursive destruction remains a witness.

proof_obligation: Every fallthrough, return, break, give, and recoverable error propagation closes owner invariants.
current_evidence_or_blocker: STOR-3 covers current whole owners; it does not repair a hole-bearing owner or force an affine token to finish.
semantic_minimum: Every non-trap exit leaves reachable owners valid and satisfies the selected exact-destruction policy.
protected_performance_rule: No mandatory cleanup callback on the hot path unless selected and measured.

proof_obligation: Dropping or forgetting an affine protocol value cannot strand invalid representation state.
current_evidence_or_blocker: Affinity prevents copies but permits abandonment; xlang has no user finalizer.
semantic_minimum: An abandonable value already owns a valid post-state, is exact-use, or has compiler-derived cleanup with explicit semantics.
protected_performance_rule: Writer discipline or a conventional finish call never counts.

proof_obligation: A trap aborts without cleanup but performs no invalid read or undefined behavior first.
current_evidence_or_blocker: EFF-4 defines trap-to-abort with no unwinding.
semantic_minimum: No recoverable post-state or drop is owed after the trap edge; pre-trap memory safety still holds.
protected_performance_rule: Do not import Rust unwind cleanup costs into xlang measurements.

proof_obligation: Every borrow retains a singleton owner provenance and outlives its storage.
current_evidence_or_blocker: OWN-5/6/10 and theorem T-A establish current lexical borrow provenance.
semantic_minimum: Returned or stored views identify their owner and cannot outlive, relocate, or destroy it.
protected_performance_rule: Proof metadata should erase; no runtime provenance field on ordinary physical borrows.

proof_obligation: Repeated calls through one uniq owner create bounded reborrows without consuming the original permanently.
current_evidence_or_blocker: The design tree greenlights reborrow-through-holder, but v0 consumes uniq borrows at calls.
semantic_minimum: A child borrow is bounded by the parent and cannot be used to retarget or escape it.
protected_performance_rule: No runtime borrow object or refcount on the static path.

proof_obligation: A function may return a borrow tied to an input owner with exact mode and region.
caller_contracts: get; first; entry view; iterator next
current_evidence_or_blocker: Result reborrow is greenlit in the design tree but not implemented.
semantic_minimum: Return provenance is derived from one declared input and respects mutation invalidation.
protected_performance_rule: No runtime owner lookup for physical borrows.

proof_obligation: Runtime evidence may prove two or more mutable places disjoint.
caller_contracts: swap; get-many-mut; graph rewiring; aligned columns
current_evidence_or_blocker: OWN-7 proves only unequal literal indices and conservatively overlaps slices.
semantic_minimum: Checked partition/distinctness produces scoped exclusive places and rejects duplicates before mutation.
protected_performance_rule: Retain one dynamic validation, then permit direct accesses without per-use alias checks where proven.

proof_obligation: Structural mutation rejects or expires every incompatible element, slice, entry, and cursor borrow.
caller_contracts: reserve; remove; rehash; clear; pool reuse
current_evidence_or_blocker: OWN-5 rejects mutation under current borrows, but no structural container facts or logical cursors exist.
semantic_minimum: Each transition lists physical and logical invalidators; stale proof state cannot authorize access.
protected_performance_rule: Compile-time invalidation for physical borrows; logical-handle checks priced only where their contract needs them.

proof_obligation: A cursor or entry state remains tied to one owner and cannot survive invalidating mutation or escape illegally.
caller_contracts: entry API; list cursor; drain; traversal mutation
current_evidence_or_blocker: No general returned reborrow, guard type, or exact-use cursor protocol.
semantic_minimum: Cursor state has one owner/provenance; early exit and abandonment preserve container validity.
protected_performance_rule: A logical handle cursor must not pay permanent address-stability cost.

proof_obligation: All size/capacity arithmetic is checked before under-allocation or state mutation.
current_evidence_or_blocker: OP-9 checks buffer allocation multiplication and traps; no growable capacity arithmetic exists.
semantic_minimum: Overflow is compile-time rejection, trap, or recoverable error exactly as frozen per operation.
protected_performance_rule: Checks may be proof-elided only through machine-verified facts.

proof_obligation: The contract distinguishes allocator failure, OOM policy, and checked capacity failure.
current_evidence_or_blocker: OP-9 leaves OOM at the TCB level; Rust stable itself exposes inconsistent recoverable allocation.
semantic_minimum: Family Lock A states which allocation points recover, abort, or remain platform policy and how offered ownership is preserved.
protected_performance_rule: Do not compare recoverable and aborting routes as the same contract.

proof_obligation: Recoverable failure occurs before destructive commit or proves complete rollback.
caller_contracts: push with growth; insert; clone; rehash; ECS migration
current_evidence_or_blocker: No general partial state or recoverable allocator path exists.
semantic_minimum: Original owner and offered affine inputs retain their documented state on every recoverable failure.
protected_performance_rule: Rollback metadata and traffic are counted; prepare-before-commit is preferred only if evidence selects it.

proof_obligation: User behavior failure or trap cannot corrupt representation invariants.
current_evidence_or_blocker: No complete callable static behavior or container transition exists.
semantic_minimum: Callbacks run only at invariant-safe boundaries or under a checked transaction whose exit policy is explicit.
protected_performance_rule: Broken logical laws may degrade results or complexity but never memory safety.

proof_obligation: A logical name continues to identify one object across permitted relocation.
caller_contracts: append-only pool; graph; stable map handle
current_evidence_or_blocker: P2 demonstrates non-reused integer indices for append-only SoA; typed handles and general library support are unimplemented.
semantic_minimum: The contract states owner/pool scope, relocation behavior, and invalidation event.
protected_performance_rule: Protected append-only access has no generation or recycling branch.

proof_obligation: Reused storage never silently revives a stale freely copied identity.
current_evidence_or_blocker: Append-only indices avoid reuse; no generation or static revocation route exists.
semantic_minimum: Finite identity must expose exhaustion, retirement, bounded lifetime, or another explicit relinquished guarantee.
protected_performance_rule: No freshness check on the distinct append-only contract.

proof_obligation: The contract states whether a handle from another owner/pool is rejected or only a logic error.
current_evidence_or_blocker: The design tree permits same-typed cross-pool misuse as a memory-safe logic bug.
semantic_minimum: Any stronger provenance promise needs an explicit representation and check budget.
protected_performance_rule: Do not claim free global uniqueness or charge it accidentally.

proof_obligation: A value's physical address remains stable until its specified invalidation/drop boundary.
current_evidence_or_blocker: No pin/address-sensitive type exists; logical handles do not imply address stability.
semantic_minimum: Separate logical identity from address and pre-drop notification.
protected_performance_rule: No pinning or indirection tax on contracts that require only logical identity.

proof_obligation: Payload lifetime, allocation lifetime, strong/weak ownership, and mutation authority are tracked separately.
current_evidence_or_blocker: STOR-3 explicitly has no reference counting; shared ownership is out of current scope.
semantic_minimum: Cycles, weak upgrade, exact resource disposition, and concurrent sharing receive an independent lock.
protected_performance_rule: No reference-count traffic on unique-owner structures.

proof_obligation: Clients cannot forge length, capacity, occupancy, balance, or cross-buffer invariant state.
current_evidence_or_blocker: No module/private-field/opaque-construction mechanism exists.
semantic_minimum: Ordinary libraries can define opaque representation and expose only invariant-preserving operations.
protected_performance_rule: Sealing must erase; no dynamic access-control branch.

proof_obligation: Equality, hash, order, clone, and other required behaviors are statically callable and contained.
current_evidence_or_blocker: FN-3 contracts/conform and FN-2 monomorphization are specified, but the complete callable member path is absent.
semantic_minimum: Calls are direct after monomorphization; broken logical laws cannot forge storage validity.
protected_performance_rule: No vtable or indirect-call tax on the canonical static path.

proof_obligation: A stateful behavior object may be invoked repeatedly with explicit ownership/borrow effects.
current_evidence_or_blocker: FN-5 proposes env-struct behavior but typed operation tables and exact calls are deferred.
semantic_minimum: State ownership, reborrow, effects, and call directness are checked without general function values.
protected_performance_rule: Direct monomorphized calls; state storage is explicit.

proof_obligation: One checked ordinary library definition instantiates over payload and behavior types.
current_evidence_or_blocker: FN-2 specifies explicit monomorphization and concrete rechecking; xlc does not yet implement the general layer.
semantic_minimum: Instantiation cannot bypass ownership or fact checks; representation specialization remains internal.
protected_performance_rule: Charge monomorphized code size as well as call directness.

proof_obligation: Traverse all elements in frozen order through shared borrows.
current_evidence_or_blocker: Index loops cover concrete contiguous cases; no generic iterator protocol or returned reborrow exists.
semantic_minimum: Each yield has owner provenance; structural mutation is excluded for the traversal lifetime.
protected_performance_rule: Canonical containers retain their required traversal complexity without per-element allocation.

proof_obligation: Traverse and mutate elements one at a time without aliasing or losing owner access.
current_evidence_or_blocker: No result reborrow or reusable uniq cursor exists.
semantic_minimum: Each yielded uniq borrow ends before the next or disjointness is proved; owner validity persists on early exit.
protected_performance_rule: No dynamic borrow table on the static unique-owner path.

proof_obligation: Consume an owner and yield each affine element exactly once, then free storage.
current_evidence_or_blocker: No affine-element collection or owning cursor protocol.
semantic_minimum: Unconsumed elements are disposed exactly once on every normal abandonment path.
protected_performance_rule: No clone and no per-element allocation solely for traversal.

proof_obligation: Checked live-set state may authorize payload access and check elimination.
current_evidence_or_blocker: Current facts cover bounds and alias channels, not partial initialization or occupancy.
semantic_minimum: Fact records producer, proposition, owner/provenance/version scope, invalidators, and consumers.
protected_performance_rule: Facts add no semantic mode switch; facts-off preserves semantics and retains checks.

proof_obligation: A checked refinement seal may authorize refined operations without repeated validation.
current_evidence_or_blocker: No refinement fact channel exists.
semantic_minimum: Only checked validation or preserving transitions mint the fact; raw mutation invalidates it.
protected_performance_rule: No validation tax on raw bytes; no unchecked assertion path.

proof_obligation: A successful identity/occupancy check may authorize scoped repeated access until invalidation.
current_evidence_or_blocker: No recyclable identity or logical cursor fact exists.
semantic_minimum: Fact is tied to pool, slot, generation/version, and mutation epoch as required by the contract.
protected_performance_rule: Append-only handles keep the existing bounds-only path.

proof_obligation: New capability adds no field, branch, check, allocation, or code-size path to fixed full Copy buffers.
current_evidence_or_blocker: D11 explicitly protects the existing fixed buffer.
semantic_minimum: Family evidence includes unchanged source, layout, optimized body, and structural counters.
protected_performance_rule: Exact non-regression control; no universal storage mode flag.

proof_obligation: New capability adds no generation, recycling, sparse, sharing, or relocation tax to append-only P2.
current_evidence_or_blocker: D11 separates append-only and recyclable identity.
semantic_minimum: Family evidence includes unchanged P2 access and machine-code accounting.
protected_performance_rule: Exact non-regression control; no runtime policy flag.
